arts.ttl: Doctor, 78, who claimed he could heal Kevin De Bruyne with 'mystic powers' is prosecuted after allegedly harassing the Man City star with several visits to his 70-acre home in Belgium
arts.sum: The first hearing was held on Wednesday afternoon at the Hasselt Criminal Court, with De Bruyne absent ahead of Manchester City's trip to Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes spots 'obvious' Kevin De Bruyne sign that points to imminent Man City exit
arts.sum: The Belgian legend is out of contract at the end of the season and could move on after a decade at the Etihad
James Maddison also returns to the starting XI, replacing Dejan Kulusevski, who starts the game amongst our substitutes. At full-back, Pedro Porro returns to the starting XI, replacing Djed Spence.

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Manchester City, Nottingham Forest v Arsenal, Manchester United v Ipswich – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 7.30pm GMT kick-offs Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And mail Taha “Red Djed Redemption. Return of the Djedi. The Walking Djed.” Ben McAleer’s had some fun taking in the resurgence of Djed Spence. Here’s today Football Daily, on the misery of the Saints. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man United vs Ipswich - Premier League: Live score and team news as Ruben Amorim's side look to record a first win in four league games plus updates from Tottenham vs Man City
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of Manchester United vs Ipswich in the Premier League with updates from Tottenham's clash at home to Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Manchester City star admits season has been ‘very difficult war’ – Struggling to accept what’s happened
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Bernardo Silva has admitted he can’t accept what has happened to them this season, having never experienced anything like it. Marca cover comments from the Portuguese international today made in an interview with DAZN about Manchester City’s struggles this season. Pep Guardiola’s side are on course for their worst campaign since 2015/16 The post Manchester City star admits season has been ‘very difficult war’ – Struggling to accept what’s happened appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy makes 2 Tottenham takeover demands as 'talks held with US billionaires'
arts.sum: It's said that Levy is pricing Spurs out of a potential takeover

arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Man City - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Manchester City visit the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium tonight as the midweek round of Premier League fixtures continues. Tottenham Hotspur host Manchester City in the Premier League tonight on the back of two consecutive wins since exiting the League Cup and FA Cup earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man City LIVE: Premier League updates, latest team news, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Resurgent Spurs aiming to inflict a third straight loss on the reigning Premier League champions

arts.ttl: There's one Premier League team it makes perfect sense for Harry Kane to sign for ...and Tottenham fans should look away now, writes SIMON JORDAN
arts.sum: SIMON JORDAN: If Harry Kane decided to return to his country next season with a £54million buy-out clause, joining this rival would be a more sensible decision than returning to Tottenham.
